changes.text: Versions no longer overwrite each other — each gets its own instance folder (stable/ and beta/)
Switching versions is now instant with no re-download needed

title: Version Picker + System Tray + Crash Detection

changes.text: Version picker — switch between Stable and Beta modpacks
API-driven dynamic content — no more hardcoded version info
System tray support — minimize to tray on game launch
Auto crash detection — popup when Minecraft crashes
Smart sync diff — shows exactly what changed
